description: Add a vaccine lot for 'Influenza, injectable, quadrivalent' (CVX 150) to the NOSH ChartingSystem inventory. Required details: Lot Number 'FL-2026-QA', Expiration Date '2026-12-31', Manufacturer 'GlaxoSmithKline', and Quantity 50. The lot must be set to active status. Login credentials: admin / Admin1234!.
